messages.message: Invalid sample channelId for colorModel in the basic DFD block.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #1 channelId in basic DFD block is (0xF) which is not valid for colorModel KHR_DF_MODEL_PVRTC2.

messages.message: Invalid sample in basic DFD block. The samples must match the expected samples of the VkFormat.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #1 channelId in basic DFD block is (0xF) but the expected value is KHR_DF_CHANNEL_PVRTC2_COLOR for VK_FORMAT_PVRTC2_4BPP_SRGB_BLOCK_IMG.

messages.message: Invalid sample qualifierLinear for non-linear transfer function in the basic DFD block.
messages.details: DFD block #1 sample #1 qualifierLinear is 0 but for KHR_DF_TRANSFER_SRGB and channelId 15 (alpha) it must be 1.

messages.message: Non-conformant texture file accepted by libktx.
messages.details: KTX 2.0 file does not conform to the specification but it is currently accepted by libktx.
